tagline: Starter scaffold — copy this directory and rename to onboard a new tenant.
_notes: This is the canonical starter for new tenants. Do NOT deploy from this directory.
When onboarding a new client: cp -r tenants/_template tenants/<slug> && update slug, displayName, tier, deployment, brand, legal.
Tier guide: 1 = brand presence (marketing site), 2 = e-commerce (Stripe Checkout, legal pages), 3 = product (custom auth/dashboards).
